title: PayPal, MoonPay and M0 launch PYUSDx to let devs issue app-specific stablecoins
message_html: PayPal, MoonPay and M0 launch PYUSDx to let devs issue app-specific stablecoins ...
snippet: PYUSDx lets developers issue app-specific stablecoins backed by PayPal USD with fast launch, cross-chain support and branded token options.
